primarySetting: Mostly ONE child's bedroom at night with a warm bedside lamp and a small child's chair; ONE page (p2) is a brief daytime kindergarten MEMORY of a musical-chairs ring. Anat the panda arrives slowly and slides to the floor. The night bedroom is the SAME set on every night page — never a clinic; the only daytime page is the explicit gan memory.
forbiddenDrift: more than one Anat / duplicate or cloned panda
the musical-chairs ring appearing inside the night bedroom
redesigning the night-bedroom set between pages
transitionRules: Night pages stay in the SAME night bedroom — camera may move, the room must not redesign.
The ONLY non-bedroom page is p2, an explicit daytime kindergarten musical-chairs memory; the ring of chairs must NOT appear on the night pages.
The small child's chair is the only object whose placement changes (corner -> beside the bed = tomorrow's chair).

scenes.label: The night bedroom
scenes.description: One child's bedroom at night — the child's bed, a warm bedside lamp pool of light, a small child's chair, dark window. The main set for the book.

scenes.label: The daytime gan memory
scenes.description: A brief DAYTIME kindergarten memory: a ring of small chairs mid musical-chairs game, every seat taken, the child at the edge with one shoe half-tied. A remembered flashback, not the bedroom.
visualAnchors: child at the edge of the circle

recurringObjects.label: the child's bed
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME child's bed every night page with the same blanket, in the warm bedside-lamp light. A child's bed, never a crib or hospital bed.

stateTimeline.state: the child lies in bed, blanket to the nose, restless and worried
the child is asleep under the blanket in the same bed

recurringObjects.label: the small child's chair
recurringObjects.identity: A SINGLE small child's chair — the social residue object ('tomorrow's chair'). The same small chair throughout; not an adult chair, not a stool, not more than one.

stateTimeline.state: a small empty child's chair stands in the corner of the bedroom
pulled out near Anat; Anat slides slowly off it back to the floor
deliberately placed BESIDE the bed as 'tomorrow's chair' — the focal object in lamp light
waiting beside the bed in a soft pool of lamp light, ready for tomorrow

recurringObjects.label: the ring of kindergarten chairs
recurringObjects.identity: The remembered ring of small kindergarten chairs from the daytime musical-chairs game. Appears ONLY in the gan memory, never in the night bedroom.
forbiddenDrift: the chair ring appearing in the night bedroom
a single chair instead of a ring

stateTimeline.state: daytime: a ring of small chairs mid-game, every seat taken, the child at the edge with one shoe half-tied

forbiddenDrift: a clinic, hospital, or medical setting
any bedroom other than this one night bedroom (night pages)
the musical-chairs ring inside the night bedroom
more than one panda or child
